steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Start with $2x^2 - 4 = x^2$. Subtract $x^2$ from both sides:
$$x^2 - 4 = 0$$
Add 4 to both sides:
$$x^2 = 4$$

steps.title: Solve and match to choices
steps.content:
Taking the square root:
$$x = \pm 2$$
Among the choices (1, 2, 3, 4), the solution $x = 2$ appears. That matches choice B — B is correct.
